en: Now the word of the LORD came to Jonah the son of Amittai, saying,
zh: 耶和華的話臨到亞米太的兒子約拿，說：

en: "Arise, go to Nineveh, that great city, and call out against it, for their evil has come up before me."
zh: “起來！到尼尼微大城去，警告其中的居民，因為他們的惡行已經達到我面前。”

en: But Jonah rose to flee to Tarshish from the presence of the LORD. He went down to Joppa and found a ship going to Tarshish. So he paid the fare and went on board, to go with them to Tarshish, away from the presence of the LORD.
zh: 可是約拿卻起來，要逃往他施去，躲避耶和華；他下到約帕，找到了一隻要開往他施去的船；他給了錢，就上船 ，要和他們同往他施去，離開耶和華。

en: But the LORD hurled a great wind upon the sea, and there was a mighty tempest on the sea, so that the ship threatened to break up.
zh: 但是耶和華在海上忽然颳起大風，於是海中狂風大作，船幾乎要破裂了。

en: Then the mariners were afraid, and each cried out to his god. And they hurled the cargo that was in the ship into the sea to lighten it for them. But Jonah had gone down into the inner part of the ship and had lain down and was fast asleep.
zh: 水手都很懼怕，各人向自己的神大聲呼求；他們為了減輕船的重量，就把船上的東西拋在海裡，可是約拿卻下了船艙，躺著熟睡了。

en: So the captain came and said to him, "What do you mean, you sleeper? Arise, call out to your god! Perhaps the god will give a thought to us, that we may not perish."
zh: 船長走到他面前，對他說：“你怎麼啦！睡得那麼熟？快起來，求告你的 神吧！或者 神會記念我們，使我們不至於喪命！”

en: And they said to one another, "Come, let us cast lots, that we may know on whose account this evil has come upon us." So they cast lots, and the lot fell on Jonah.
zh: 水手就彼此說：“來吧！讓我們抽籤，好知道這場災禍臨到我們，是因誰的緣故。”於是他們抽籤，結果抽中了約拿。

en: Then they said to him, "Tell us on whose account this evil has come upon us. What is your occupation? And where do you come from? What is your country? And of what people are you?"
zh: 他們就對約拿說：“請告訴我們，這場災禍臨到我們，是因誰的緣故？你是作甚麼的？你從哪裡來？你是哪一國的人？哪一族的人？”

en: And he said to them, "I am a Hebrew, and I fear the LORD, the God of heaven, who made the sea and the dry land."
zh: 他回答說：“我是希伯來人，我敬畏耶和華天上的 神，就是那創造海洋和陸地的。”

en: Then the men were exceedingly afraid and said to him, "What is this that you have done!" For the men knew that he was fleeing from the presence of the LORD, because he had told them.
zh: 眾人就大大懼怕，對他說：“你為甚麼這樣作呢？ ”那些人知道他躲避耶和華，原來約拿告訴了他們。

en: Then they said to him, "What shall we do to you, that the sea may quiet down for us?" For the sea grew more and more tempestuous.
zh: 因為海浪越來越洶湧，他們又對他說：“我們該怎樣處置你，才能叫海浪平靜呢？”

en: He said to them, "Pick me up and hurl me into the sea; then the sea will quiet down for you, for I know it is because of me that this great tempest has come upon you."
zh: 他回答說：“你們把我抬起來，投在海裡，海浪就會平靜，因為我知道，這場大風暴臨到你們，是為了我的緣故。”

en: Nevertheless, the men rowed hard to get back to dry land, but they could not, for the sea grew more and more tempestuous against them.
zh: 那些人雖然破浪掙扎，要把船靠岸，卻是不能，因為海浪不斷洶湧撲來。

en: Therefore they called out to the LORD, "O LORD, let us not perish for this man's life, and lay not on us innocent blood, for you, O LORD, have done as it pleased you."
zh: 他們就呼求耶和華，說：“耶和華啊！我們懇求你，不要因這人叫我們喪命；不要把無辜人的血歸在我們身上，因為你耶和華是照自己所喜悅的行事。”

en: So they picked up Jonah and hurled him into the sea, and the sea ceased from its raging.
zh: 於是他們把約拿抬起來，投在海裡，怒濤就平息了。

en: Then the men feared the LORD exceedingly, and they offered a sacrifice to the LORD and made vows.
zh: 那些人就大大敬畏耶和華，向他獻祭和許願。

en: And the LORD appointed a great fish to swallow up Jonah. And Jonah was in the belly of the fish three days and three nights.
zh: 耶和華卻安排了一條大魚，把約拿吞下。約拿就在魚腹中三日三夜。
